race_meta.race_name: Read Meg Nicholls' Blog At betmgm.co.uk Handicap

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Model ranked zipwire at position 5 with only 12.0% probability. Top pick was Berkshire Schmokin (35.0%). Analysis missed key factors driving the winning horse's form.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Berkshire Schmokin (IRE) > Extraterrestrial (IRE), but actual result was Zipwire > Aneirin's Sword. Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
